title: Julie's Chocolate Chip Cookie Recipe
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, place both sugars and blend until well combined.
Add butter and cream until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes.
Add eggs one at a time and beat until well combined, about 3 minutes.
Add dry ingredients and mix well.
Shape dough into balls and place on lightly greased cookie sheet.
Leave cookies on cookie sheet for 3 minutes to cool and set.
Remove from cookie sheet and place on aluminum foil or parchment paper to cool completely.
notes: Cookies should be slightly underbaked for best texture
